prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic fashion portrait of the same man sitting confidently on a modern luxury chair in a professional studio setup. He is wearing the latest Liverpool FC home jersey, fitted white jeans, and stylish red Puma sneakers matching the jersey colors. The pose should look natural, relaxed, and masculine with crossed legs and one hand resting casually on the chair arm. Keep the facial structure, hairstyle, beard, and expression highly similar to the reference image.

Background should be clean minimalist gray with soft cinematic lighting, premium fashion-magazine vibe, ultra-detailed textures, realistic skin tones, sharp focus, high-end editorial photography style, 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field, symmetrical composition, full body visible.

Add subtle luxury aesthetics and modern sporty elegance. Photorealistic, 8K quality, highly detailed, natural shadows, perfect posture, stylish and confident mood.
